# Support

## Where to get help

| Need | Where |
|------|--------|
| General project / design | [bestrom-project Discussions/Issues](https://github.com/Mohithash/bestrom-project/issues) |
| Build / manifest / porting | [bestrom_manifest](https://github.com/Mohithash/bestrom_manifest/issues) |
| Device bugs (peridot) | [device_xiaomi_peridot](https://github.com/Mohithash/device_xiaomi_peridot/issues) |
| Downloads | [SourceForge bestrom](https://sourceforge.net/projects/bestrom/) |

## Before opening an issue

1. Read [ABOUT.md](../docs/ABOUT.md) and [PHILOSOPHY.md](../docs/PHILOSOPHY.md)  
2. Read [PORTING.md](https://github.com/Mohithash/bestrom_manifest/blob/17/PORTING.md) for A17 status  
3. Search existing issues  

## What we can’t support yet

- “When is A17 stable?” — WIP first-wave port  
- Device requests without maintainers / trees  
- Paid app DRM / banking guarantees on unofficial builds  

## Social

Share with the [press kit](../docs/PRESS_KIT.md). Always link the **hub** repo for visibility.
